findings.evidence: The existing/new signatures are fibre-only at `Deck.lean:74` and `Deck.lean:81`; both proofs use only `map_proj` (`Deck.lean:57`) and never use any property of `{b}` beyond membership in a subset of `B`.
findings.fix: Add general lemmas such as `image_preimage (φ : Deck p) (s : Set B) : φ.1 '' (p ⁻¹' s) = p ⁻¹' s` and `preimage_preimage (φ : Deck p) (s : Set B) : φ.1 ⁻¹' (p ⁻¹' s) = p ⁻¹' s`, then derive the fibre lemmas by specializing `s = {b}`.
findings.issue: `image_fiber` and `preimage_fiber` are singleton special cases of the natural invariant-subset statement for any `s : Set B`.

summary: The fibre action homomorphisms are at the intended level, but the new image/preimage API is stated only for singleton fibres even though the same deck condition naturally preserves every inverse-image subset of the base.
